uplink.description: water-level frame: ULB16 loop current 5.0 mA -> 0.313 m
uplink._note: Synthetic RAK Standardized Payload (RAK2560 + ULB16): analog-input channel 0x02 = 0x01F4 = 5.00 mA (cross-checked against the upstream RAK decoder, analog_in 5.0). ULB16 4-20 mA maps to 0-5 m at 3.2 mA/m: (5-4)/3.2 = 0.3125 -> water.level 0.313 m; voltage 0x016D = 3.65 V -> battery. Satisfies groundwater (atLeastOne water.level).

uplink.description: Frame without an analog-input (level) channel -> error
uplink._note: A frame with only battery and no analog level channel carries no level reading.
